CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2004 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218
Off Calendar Nov-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Appearances:
Robert Burton, Esq. for Petitioner Stephanie Jackson present as guardian ad litem for eric Martin, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's fees in the amount of $1,499.20
Costs of $4,003.17
The Balance of the settlement proceeds of $4,497.63 shall be disbursed to the Petitioner, Stephanie Jackson to be held in trust for the benefit of the Minor, until the age of 18.
Order signed in court.
